name: brreg-now
description: Look up Norwegian company info from Brønnøysundregistrene with one click.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; object-src 'self'; connect-src https://data.brreg.no; base-uri 'none'; form-action 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'
